action.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a potion recipe, a wardrobe, a bed, a book and a pillow. The potion recipe is on the bed. The wardrobe is closed. The book is on the bed. The pillow is on the floor. There is a passage to a reading room here.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the potion recipe. In your inventory you have a potion recipe.
action.label: context

action.content: The wardrobe is now open. The wardrobe is empty.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the book. In your inventory you have a book and a potion recipe.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a reading room now. There are a shelf, a table, a side table, a couch and a chair. There are passages to a conservatory and a garden here.
action.label: context

action.content: This is a shelf. There is nothing on the shelf.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a conservatory now. There are a prickly pear and a planting table. The prickly pear is on the floor. There is a passage to a hallway here.
action.label: context

action.content: Your inventory can not hold more than two objects at the same time.
action.label: context

action.content: You drop the potion recipe on the floor.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the prickly pear. In your inventory you have a book and a prickly pear.
action.label: context

action.content: You can't go to a garden from here.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a hallway now. There are passages to a bedroom, a magic workshop, a reading room and a broom closet here.
action.label: context

action.content:
You are in a magic workshop now. There are a fire wand, a zulpowand, a ice wand, a workbench, a orrery and a fairy wand. The fire wand is on the ceiling. The zulpowand is on the ceiling. The ice wand is on the ceiling. The fairy wand is on the ceiling. There are passages to a kitchen and a bedroom here.
Magical experiments have reversed and dampened gravity in this room. You begin to float in the air.
action.label: context

action.content: Your inventory can not hold more than two objects at the same time.
action.label: context

action.content:
You drop the book on the floor.
The book floats up to the ceiling.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the fairy wand. In your inventory you have a fairy wand and a prickly pear.
action.label: context

action.content:
You are in a kitchen now. There are a plate, a cauldron, a cupboard and a counter. The plate is on the floor. The cauldron is on the floor. The cupboard is closed. There are passages to a conservatory and a pantry here.
Gravity behaves normally in this room. You stop floating in the air.
action.label: context
